sampleSummary.notes: Seed fixture for schema validation, not a real profile.

evidence: Thanks for flagging this — I'll fix it today.

sentenceRhythm.description: Short declaratives mixed with one longer explanatory sentence per paragraph.
evidence: It broke. Here's why, and here's the fix.

paragraphStructure.description: Two to three sentence paragraphs, one idea each.

directness.description: States the ask or the answer first, context after.
evidence: No, I can't take this on this sprint.

evidenceStyle.description: Backs claims with a specific example rather than a general statement.

lexicon.description: Plain word choices, avoids corporate jargon.

hedging.description: States uncertainty plainly ("not sure yet") instead of stacking hedges.

strategyNotes: Lead with the concrete match to the ask before any framing.

examples.generic: I am confident that my skills and experience make me a strong candidate.
examples.inVoice: I've shipped three of these end to end, most recently the Q2 migration.
examples.rationale: Replaces an unsupported confidence claim with a named, checkable result.

limits: Do not fabricate employment history or credentials not present in the supplied sources.

customBlocklist.reason: Never appears in any supplied sample; reads as corporate filler.

sources.title: Slack message to teammate
sources.text: No, I can't take this on this sprint. Happy to look at it next week if it's still open.
